title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Upstox Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Upstox Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox Asia Pacific Associates in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox Asia Pacific Associates:
Upstox Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox Asia Pacific Associates!
